# PR Readiness Checklist

## Structure

- [ ] Skill folder exists under `skills/<name>/`
- [ ] `SKILL.md` exists with valid frontmatter
- [ ] `AUTHORS.md` exists
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` exists
- [ ] Long examples moved to `references/` when appropriate

## Quality

- [ ] Description is specific and trigger-friendly
- [ ] Instructions are action-oriented
- [ ] Customer-specific names removed
- [ ] Sensitive paths, hosts, and IDs generalized
- [ ] Operational messages are in English

## Governance

- [ ] Release plan month file updated
- [ ] Status value set correctly
- [ ] Summary table updated
- [ ] Changelog updated with current date and author
